name: Can LLMs Reliably Simulate Real Students' Abilities in Mathematics and Reading Comprehension?
venue: Proceedings of the 20th Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications
summary: BEA 2025 paper evaluating whether LLM proxy students can reproduce real student ability patterns in mathematics and reading comprehension using NAEP items and IRT-scale comparison.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology PDF is available and was used for table-level extraction.
